data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that only 2 customers have booked the tour, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants to avoid cancellation. This directly leads to a cancellation scenario, which is a critical aspect of the expected result for the persona scenario. The failure to meet the minimum booking requirement creates a gap in validating the expected behavior of the auto-offer upon cancellation, as outlined in the use case.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked the tour, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
